channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Paul Pelosi in hit-and-run in California, car left with major damage, authorities say
item.description: The husband of former House Speaker Nancy Pelosi was involved in a hit-and-run in California that left a parked car with "major" damage, authorities s...

item.title: Pastor freed from prison in China weeks after Trump requested his release
item.description: A pastor of a prominent underground church who was detained in China in October has been released, less than two months after U.S. President Donald Tr...

item.title: Schisto & Ladders offers educational value and worms, surpassing Chutes & Ladders
item.description: Schistosomiasis, spread by parasitic worms through water, causes severe symptoms in children. A board game teaches prevention.

item.title: Trump's Mount Rushmore speech shifts from exceptionalism to warnings about communism
item.description: President Trump marked America's 250th anniversary with a politically charged speech that deviated from traditional unifying addresses.
